description: DEPRECATED — superseded by virtualisation-v1 (DD-157). Virtual machine lifecycle service contract v1 — 16 operations across VM provisioning, GPU management, and cloud-init deployment. Retained for backward compatibility; existing packs continue to resolve via the virtualmachine service alias.

operations.description: List all VMs/instances with status, region, GPU type, and hourly cost
operations.name: vm_list

operations.description: Get details for a single VM by ID including IP addresses and provisioning state
operations.name: vm_get

operations.description: Get current power state and health for a VM
operations.name: vm_status

operations.description: List available regions/datacentres with GPU plan availability
operations.name: vm_list_regions

operations.description: List available VM plans/sizes with GPU specs (name, VRAM, count) and hourly pricing
operations.name: vm_list_plans

operations.description: List available OS images and snapshots for VM creation
operations.name: vm_list_images

operations.description: List SSH keys available for injection into new VMs
operations.name: vm_ssh_keys

operations.description: Create a new VM with GPU, inject cloud-init user data for worker bootstrap (destructive, requires confirmation)
operations.name: vm_create

operations.description: Permanently destroy a VM and its resources (destructive, requires confirmation)
operations.name: vm_delete

operations.description: Stop a running VM (preserves disk, stops compute billing on most providers)
operations.name: vm_stop

operations.description: Change VM plan/GPU type (provider-dependent, may require restart)
operations.name: vm_resize

operations.description: Get console access URL or recent console output
operations.name: vm_console

operations.description: Get CPU, GPU, memory, and network metrics for a VM
operations.name: vm_metrics

operations.description: List, create, or restore VM snapshots
operations.name: vm_snapshots

title: virtualmachine-v1
